economic_notes: Nation has investments in cannabis production (Costa Canna LLP, Costa Canna Production LLP), gaming (Khowutzun Gaming Corp/Chances Cowichan), forestry (Khowutzun Forest Services Ltd and LP), mini mall, information solutions, residential suites, fisheries, and tree shelters. Audit qualified due to unavailability of audited financials for Costa Canna Production LLP and Chances Cowichan.
notes: Audit is qualified due to unavailability of audited financial statements for Costa Canna Production LLP and Chances Cowichan (a joint venture of Khowutzun Gaming Corporation) as at the audit report date. Prior year (2020) figures are restated per Note 19. Khowutzun Development Corporation was consolidated into the Nation in 2021 (previously treated as a controlled business under modified equity). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + DFO + CMHC + Province of BC Other + FNESC + Coast Salish Employment and Training Society + Province of BC Forestry Agreement = 42637358+7659213+2251369+337304+5293576+1811359+645194+772600+158319 (Province BC Host Local Govt was 0 actual) = 61408473; OSR includes tobacco tax, property tax, community improvement fee, investment income, rental income, gaming revenue, licence fees, other income, other agencies, less loss from enterprises. Net financial assets per statement of changes: 22,549,309. Balance sheet detail for current liabilities, deferred revenue, long-term debt, and TCA net book value not fully extracted from available text.
